<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:伊奈冨神社]]
<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v25_with_redirects.py-->
{{Expand Japanese|伊奈冨神社}}

{{Infobox religious building
| name = Inafuno Shrine
| native_name = 伊奈冨神社
| mapframe = yes
| mapframe-zoom = 15
| mapframe-wikidata = yes
| mapframe-point = none
| map_type = Japan
| map_caption = Inafuno Shrine
| coordinates = {{coord|34.837555|136.552258}}
| map_relief = 1
| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]
}}

{{nihongo|'''Inafuno Shrine'''|伊奈冨神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Ise Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

* {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}}
* {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ka|ძინძია|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}}
* {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|en|Shikinai Shosha|ja|式内小社|simple|Shikinai Shosha|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}}
* {{ill|Q135160342|ltq=Q135160342|qid=Q135160342|1=Kokuhei-sha}}

** P1001: {{ill|Ise Province|lt=Ise Province|be|Ісэ (правінцыя)|ckb|پارێزگای ئیسێ|cs|Provincie Ise|de|Provinz Ise|en|Ise Province|es|Provincia de Ise|eu|Ise probintzia|fa|ولایت ایسه|fi|Isen provinssi|fr|Province d'Ise|gl|Provincia de Ise|hak|Yî-sṳ-koet|id|Provinsi Ise|it|Ise (provincia)|ja|伊勢国|ko|이세국|lt|Isės žemė|nl|Ise (provincie)|pt|Província de Ise|ru|Исэ (провинция)|simple|Ise Province|sk|Ise (provincia)|sr|Провинција Исе|tr|Ise (vilayet)|uk|Провінція Ісе|zh_min_nan|Ise-kok|zh_yue|伊勢國|zh|伊勢國|qid=Q864166|1=Ise Province}}

== street address (P6375) ==

* {'text': '三重県鈴鹿市稲生西', 'language': 'ja'}








[[JA:伊奈冨神社]]

{{wikidata link|Q135039344}}

== Japanese content ==
{{神社
| 名称 = Inafuno Shrine
| 画像 = {{画像募集中|cat=鈴鹿市}}
| 所在地 = {{ill|lt=Mie Prefecture|Q128196|qid=Q128196|1=Mie Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Suzuka|Q207311|qid=Q207311|1=Suzuka, Mie}} Inō Nishi 2-24-20
| 位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}}
| 祭神 = Ukemochi no Kami Ōkuni no Michi no Mikoto
| 神体 = 
| 社格 =  {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}}, former prefectural shrine
| 創建 = 
| 本殿 = 
| 別名 = 
| 札所等 = 
| 例祭 = April 16
| 神事 = 
| 地図 = {{Location map|Japan Mie|label=Inafuno Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}}
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}}
}}
'''Inafuno Shrine''' (いのうじんじゃ) is a shrine {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=enshrined|1=UNKNOWN}} in Inō Nishi, {{ill|lt=Suzuka|Q207311|qid=Q207311|1=Suzuka, Mie}}, {{ill|lt=Mie Prefecture|Q128196|qid=Q128196|1=Mie Prefecture}}. It is an {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Engishiki shrine|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286|lt=Shikinaisha}}, and its former rank was prefectural shrine.

=== Origin ===
It is said that a divine spirit appeared at Higashi-ga-oka (inside {{ill|lt=Suzuka Circuit|Q174170|qid=Q174170|1=Suzuka Circuit}}) and was enshrined in the 5th year of {{ill|lt=Emperor Sujin|Q333530|qid=Q333530|1=Emperor Sujin}}<ref>{{Cite web|title=三重県神社庁 伊奈冨神社|url=http://kyoka.mie-jinjacho.or.jp/shrine/%e4%bc%8a%e5%a5%88%e5%86%a8%e7%a5%9e%e7%a4%be/|access-date=2025-12-2}}</ref>. In Jōgan 7 it rose from Senior Fifth Rank Upper to Junior Fourth Rank Lower, and around the mid-{{ill|lt=Kamakura period|Q236205|qid=Q236205|1=Kamakura period}} it advanced to {{ill|lt=Senior First Rank|Q11123258|qid=Q11123258|1=Senior First Rank}}; in Bun'ei 11 it received an imperial plaque and was called "Senior First Rank Inō Daimyōjin"<ref>{{Cite web|title=県神社庁 伊奈冨神社|url=https://jinja-net.jp/jinja-all/jsearch3all.php?jinjya=2998|access-date=2025-12-30}}</ref>.

=== Enshrined deities ===
* Principal deity: Ukemochi no Kami Ōkuni no Michi no Mikoto
* Associated deities: Toyoukano-me no Mikoto / {{ill|UNKNOWN|qid=Q10921330|lt=Wakumusubi-no-Kami|1=Wakumusubi}} / Naruikō-no-Kami / {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ōyamazumi-no-Kami|1=UNKNOWN}}

=== Annual festival ===
*April 16
*Its ritual is listed in [https://dl.ndl.go.jp/pid/1257927/1/50 Special Rituals in Mie Prefecture]

=== Cultural property ===
The lion kagura is designated as a prefectural {{ill|lt=intangible cultural property|Q2901957|qid=Q2901957|1=Intangible Cultural Property (Japan)}}<ref>{{Cite web|title=鈴鹿市|url=https://www.city.suzuka.lg.jp/bunka/bunkazai/1003316.html|access-date=2025-12-31}}</ref>.
